'''Essara''' was a [[Tarasin]]. He once posed as a double for [[Va'Lonis]], a member of the band [[Distraction]]. Along with doubles of the other band members, he was escorted off the ship ''[[Sleemo Poya Jeedai]]'' by [[Xydge]], as part of a security ploy.

{{Char-stub}}
